languages.text: "А ну цыц! Не расстраивайтесь, Лорд-капитан, в следующий раз повезет".
"Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."
languages.original_text: "А ну цыц! Не расстраивайтесь, Лорд-капитан, в следующий раз повезет".

traits.locale_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get them next time."
"Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get them next time."
"Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."
"Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

languages.text: “安静，你们这群家伙！没关系，舰长大人，下回肯定能行的。”
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: “安静，你们这群家伙！没关系，舰长大人，下回肯定能行的。”

languages.text: "Sessiz olun! Merak etmeyin Lord Kaptan, bir dahaki sefere yaparsınız."
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: "Sessiz olun! Merak etmeyin Lord Kaptan, bir dahaki sefere yaparsınız."

languages.text: « Taisez-vous, vous autres ! Ne vous inquiétez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, vous finirez bien par prendre le coup de main. »
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: « Taisez-vous, vous autres ! Ne vous inquiétez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, vous finirez bien par prendre le coup de main. »

languages.text: «¡Silencio, chusma! No se preocupe, Lord Capitán. Lo hará mejor la próxima vez».
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: «¡Silencio, chusma! No se preocupe, Lord Capitán. Lo hará mejor la próxima vez».

languages.text: "Ruhe im Kuhstall! Keine Sorge, Lord Captain, beim nächsten Mal klappt es."
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: "Ruhe im Kuhstall! Keine Sorge, Lord Captain, beim nächsten Mal klappt es."

languages.text: 「静かに、みんな！大丈夫、艦長様、次は手に入りますよ。」
languages.original_text: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."

traits.locale_text: 「静かに、みんな！大丈夫、艦長様、次は手に入りますよ。」
